evals.prompt: Find me a bull put spread on AAPL.
evals.expected_output: A complete trade card with short put strike, long put strike, net credit, max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk. Should use ~20 delta short put and ~35-45 DTE expiry by default. Should include a risk checklist and rationale.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: has_both_legs
assertions.description: Response explicitly shows both the short (SELL) put strike and the long (BUY) put strike

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes all five metrics: max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk

assertions.name: uses_default_20_delta
assertions.description: Response targets ~20 delta for the short put (not a custom delta) since none was specified

assertions.name: uses_35_45_dte
assertions.description: Response targets an expiry in the 35–45 DTE window

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes a risk signal checklist covering at least earnings and IV rank

evals.prompt: I want to sell a 15-delta put on NVDA. Set up the full put spread for me.
evals.expected_output: Trade card using 15-delta (not the default 20-delta) short put. Strikes should be further OTM than a 20-delta spread. Should explicitly acknowledge the 15-delta override and adjust the OTM% approximation accordingly. Probability of profit should be ~85%.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: respects_15_delta
assertions.description: Response explicitly uses 15-delta for the short put, not the default 20-delta

assertions.name: pop_near_85pct
assertions.description: Probability of profit is stated as approximately 85% (consistent with 1 - 0.15 delta)

assertions.name: strike_further_otm
assertions.description: Short strike is positioned more than 10% below current NVDA price (further OTM than a 20Δ put)

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk

evals.prompt: Set up a bull put spread on TSLA, 6 weeks out.
evals.expected_output: Trade card for TSLA. Should surface the earnings flag (Tesla reports ~April 28 2026 which falls near the 6-week window) and the very low IV rank (~5.88, well below 25) as risk warnings. Should recommend avoiding the expiry that straddles earnings, or clearly flag it.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: flags_low_iv_rank
assertions.description: Response flags the low IV rank (below 25) as a caution — premium is thin

assertions.name: flags_earnings_event
assertions.description: Response identifies the Tesla earnings event (~April 28 2026) as a risk within or near the expiry window

assertions.name: avoids_or_warns_earnings_expiry
assertions.description: Response either selects a pre-earnings expiry (April 25) or explicitly warns that May 2 expiry straddles earnings

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk
